message.content:
@startuml
actor "CPO1" as CPO1
participant HUB
database MSP1

activate CPO1 
note right of CPO1 : HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1 \nFROM: CPO1 

HUB ->> MSP1  :HTTP: GET\n TO:MSP1 \n FROM:CPO1  
MSP1 --> HUB   :HTTP: RESPONSE\n TO:CP01 \n FROM:MSP1  

deactivate MSP1   
return    to CPo1 from msp1    
@enduml
